===={{aniseries|JN}}====
[[File:JN012.png|thumb|250px|Lance facing Leon in the finals of the World Coronation Series]]
In ''[[JN012|Flash of the Titans!]]'', Lance was revealed to have won the [[Pokémon World Tournament]] in [[Driftveil City]], as well as having been strong enough to reach the finals of the [[World Coronation Series]], in which eight of the strongest Trainers from their respective [[region]]s gather to compete for the title of Monarch. During the finals at [[Wyndon Stadium]], Lance faced the [[Galar League]] Champion {{an|Leon}}. Using his [[Dynamax Band]], he was able to [[Dynamax]] his Red Gyarados and pit it against [[Leon's Charizard]], which Leon [[Gigantamax]]ed in response. After a fierce battle, Gyarados was defeated, and Lance congratulated his opponent for becoming the Monarch. He also revealed that he had trained at [[Hammerlocke Stadium|Galar's Dragon-type Gym]], and that he had been so impressed by the uniforms he saw there that he had chosen to base his current outfit on them. 

In ''[[JN077|Ultra Exciting from the Shocking Start!]]'', ''[[JN086|A Battle of Mega Versus Max!]]'', and ''[[JN099|Battling Turned Up to Eleven!]]'', Lance appeared in a fantasy along with other Trainers participating in the World Coronation Series. 

During the reveal of the full Masters Eight roster in ''[[JN109|Aim For The Eight!]]'', Lance is revealed to be ranked fourth.
[[File:Lance and Diantha.png|250px|thumb|left|Lance and Diantha]]
In ''[[JN114|Friends, Rivals, Lend Me Your Spirit!]]'', Lance appeared in a fantasy alongside {{an|Cynthia}} and {{an|Steven Stone}}. [[Paul]] used a team based on their aces during his battle with {{Ash}}.

In ''[[JN115|Curtain Up! Fight the Fights!]]'', Lance attended the [[Masters Eight Tournament]] of the World Coronation Series, reuniting with Ash and Leon, and meeting {{an|Iris}}, [[Alain]], and the other regional Champions. During the opening ceremony, his first opponent was selected to be [[Diantha]]. During Leon and [[Alain]]'s battle, Lance talked to Steven about his history with Alain. Following the conclusion of the prior match, Lance headed to the battlefield to start his battle with Diantha. During the [[JN116|next episode]], despite a strong performance and holding the lead for the majority of the battle, he was defeated by the [[Kalos]] Champion, making him the second person to be eliminated from the tournament. Following his loss, he briefly exchanged words with Ash, where he seemed positive despite the result of the battle, before heading back to [[Johto]].

In ''[[JN129|A Flood of Torrential Gains!]]'', Lance watched Ash's match against Leon alongside {{TP|Lance|Dragonite}}.
{{-}}
